subcodes.first_line: O Divine Faraj! The letter which thou didst write to one of the friends was perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرج الهی مکتوبی که مرقوم بیکی از یاران نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @poems and quotation from poetry, @suffering and imprisonment
